events.title: Riverside Middle School 8th Grade Graduation Ceremony (Class of 2026)
events.location: Riverside Middle School Gymnasium, 200 Riverside Drive, San Jose, CA 95123
events.description:
Riverside Middle School 8th Grade Graduation Ceremony (Class of 2026).

Date: Friday, June 12, 2026
Time: 6:00 PM (Doors open at 5:30 PM; seating first-come, first-served)
Location: Riverside Middle School Gymnasium, 200 Riverside Drive, San Jose, CA 95123

Program highlights:
- 6:00 PM Processional
- 6:15 PM Welcome & National Anthem
- 6:20 PM Student Speeches
- 6:40 PM Guest Speaker
- 7:00 PM Diploma Presentation
- 7:45 PM Closing Remarks

Notes: Semi-formal attire. Parking available in school lot and on street. Tickets: 4 per family (distributed in May). Professional photos available for purchase. Reception follows at 8:00 PM in the courtyard.

events.title: Riverside Middle School Graduation Reception (Courtyard)
events.location: Riverside Middle School Courtyard, 200 Riverside Drive, San Jose, CA 95123
events.description:
Reception following the graduation ceremony.

Date: Friday, June 12, 2026
Time: 8:00 PM
Location: Riverside Middle School Courtyard, 200 Riverside Drive, San Jose, CA 95123

Occurs immediately after the closing remarks of the graduation ceremony.
